category_sources: Official GitHub README describes mani as a CLI tool for managing multiple repositories.
source_facts.description says mani is a CLI tool to help manage repositories.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses the display name mani.
source_facts.name gives the project name as mani.
docs_sources: Official repository README links manicli.com as the project site and documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage provides the official Mani documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists multi-repository cloning, cross-repository commands, TUI, filtering, and shell completion features.
source_facts.description identifies repository management CLI functionality.
